steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content:
The text begins with a general overview of Barragan’s career, then describes a transition after his 1930s travels.

The decisive signal is the phrase “evolved through distinct phases” and the following contrast between modernist and earlier designs, indicating a shift in style as the central structural move.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Choice B captures this structure: the first sentence is a general statement about his career, the second highlights the transition triggered by travel, and the third explains how the shift is manifested in his work.

The other three choices misrepresent the focus (
  • A mentions influence
  • C references earlier architects not discussed
  • D separates "early stages" from the transition instead of describing its evidence)
.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
